evidence.scientific_clarity: Three-method loss curves with shaded 95% CI, log-scale y-axis, and annotated gap Delta=0.155 at final step clearly convey OursModel's superiority; brief's claim is fully represented.
evidence.typography: Script sets no pdf.fonttype=42 or svg.fonttype='none'; PDF embeds DejaVu Sans as Type 3 (bitmap glyphs), SVG renders all text as paths — neither format has selectable/editable text.
evidence.palette: Red (#D65F5F) and green (#6ACC65) are used for OursModel and Method-A respectively — a red-green pair that fails deuteranopia/protanopia; red is also assigned to the best-performing method, violating directional convention.
evidence.layout_density: figsize=(6,4) with tight_layout and xlim extended by 4 steps for annotation; space is used reasonably, though the extra right margin for the bracket annotation leaves modest whitespace.
evidence.reviewer_readiness: Caption matches figure content and the Delta value; legend is placed upper-right which may overlap curves at early steps; no panel labels needed for single panel; overall close to submission-ready.
evidence.vector_fidelity: PDF uses Type 3 (bitmap) fonts confirmed by pdffonts; SVG has 0 <text> elements and 59 <path> elements — all text is outline-converted; neither file supports text selection or editing.
evidence.file_format: figure.pdf, figure.png, figure.svg, caption.tex, and gen_figure.py all exist and are non-trivial; data.json is absent from the work directory (consumed at generation time), which is acceptable.
evidence.caption_quality: Caption states method count, step count, CI level, seed count, convergence direction, and a specific numerical gap (Delta=0.155) between OursModel and next-best Method-A — fully informative standalone caption.

overall_strengths: Scientific content is complete and well-annotated: log-scale loss curves, shaded CI bands, and a clearly labelled gap bracket directly address the brief's requirements.
Caption is exemplary — it names all visual elements, quantifies the key finding (Delta=0.155), and provides statistical context (n=5 seeds, 95% CI).
overall_weaknesses: Font embedding is broken: no pdf.fonttype=42 or svg.fonttype='none' in the script, producing Type 3 bitmap glyphs in the PDF and outline paths in the SVG — text is not selectable or editable in either vector format.
Palette is colorblind-unsafe: the red/green pair for OursModel and Method-A is indistinguishable under deuteranopia/protanopia, and red is counterintuitively assigned to the best-performing method.
